summary: Tested Admin Panel expanded features: 3 new tabs (Categorias, Configuracion, Soporte) added to existing 6 tabs = 9 total tabs. All 28 backend tests passed. Frontend testing confirmed all 9 tabs working with full CRUD functionality for categories, config updates, and ticket management.

critical_code_review_comments: All 3 new features (Categories CRUD, Config, Support Tickets) are properly implemented
Backend endpoints correctly exclude MongoDB _id from responses
Proper validation on config updates (fee range 0-50%, no negative values)
Category deletion properly blocked when businesses use the category
Ticket respond endpoint correctly changes status to 'in_progress'
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
API integration in api.js correctly implements all new admin endpoints

admin.note: Requires TOTP 2FA - use /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py to generate code

seed_data_creation: 3 test support tickets exist in DB (created directly via MongoDB)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel now has 9 tabs. Categories CRUD fully working with duplicate slug validation and deletion blocking when businesses use category. Platform config allows updating fee %, subscription price, trial days, min deposit with validation. Support tickets have list/stats/detail/respond/close functionality. Admin login requires TOTP 2FA - use /app/scripts/get_admin_totp.py.
